summary: First end-to-end test of Pronostix AI (French sports-betting predictions app). Backend pytest suite (20 tests) covers auth, matches/predictions/top/combo, AI analysis, history seeding, subscription checkout+confirm. All 20 pass. Frontend Playwright covers landing → register/login → dashboard with sport filters → match detail with Claude/AI fallback analysis → top picks → combos slider → history KPIs → MoMo subscription upgrade → logout + protected-route guard. All critical user flows succeed.
action_items: Optional polish: sport-filter data-testids use raw sport keys (sport-filter-all/soccer/basketball/football/hockey/mma/tennis) where 'football' = NFL and 'soccer' = Football. The display labels (Tous/Football/Basket/NFL...) differ from the testid suffixes. Functional, but consider aligning testids with French labels (sport-filter-tous/football/basket/nfl) to match the request spec and reduce confusion for future tests.
No other action items — app is in a shippable state for the listed scope.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: subscription/confirm endpoint allows any authenticated user to self-confirm their own pending payment. Acceptable for demo, but in production must be admin-only or tied to a real MoMo webhook.

ai_analysis_cache uses Mongo _id as a string composite key (match_id-date). Works, but be aware that the cached analysis is also returned to free users on subsequent calls even though the original might have been a paid Claude call (cache is not tier-aware). Currently safe because free user is always served first and caches the fallback; mention this trade-off in product notes.
Frontend MatchDetailPage swallows errors in fetchAnalysis (catch{}) — log to console at minimum to aid future debugging.
Backend has no rate-limiting on /auth/login or /auth/register — fine for MVP but should be added before production launch.
test_credentials: demo@pronostix.ai / demo1234 (free tier, working). Test-created users use TEST_*@pronostix.ai prefix.
seed_data_creation: GET /api/predictions/history auto-seeds 12 historical predictions (deterministic) into predictions_log on first call. TestSubscription.test_checkout_and_confirm_upgrades_tier created a TEST_*@pronostix.ai user and upgraded it to Pro (does NOT touch the demo user).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/test_pronostix_api.py — run with `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_pronostix_api.py -v`. Two test bugs were fixed in this iteration: (1) /api/auth/register lowercases email, (2) /api/predictions/top returns flat objects (no nested 'prediction' wrapper). Demo creds: demo@pronostix.ai / demo1234. ODDS_API_KEY is intentionally empty (mock data, ~31 matches/day, deterministic). Frontend data-testids for sport filters use raw sport keys (all/soccer/basketball/football/hockey/mma/tennis) — football testid = NFL display label.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no production bugs found. The two pytest failures in iteration 1 were test-side mistakes (wrong assertions), now corrected and all 20 tests green.
